# Anthropic Newsroom - Comprehensive Content Extraction

## Featured Stories (Featured Grid Section)

1. **"What 81,000 people want from AI"** (Mar 18, 2026)
   - Large multilingual qualitative study of Claude.ai users
   - Explores how users employ AI, aspirations, and concerns

2. **Introducing Claude Sonnet 4.6** (Feb 17, 2026)
   - "frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work"

3. **Introducing Claude Opus 4.6** (Feb 5, 2026)
   - Upgraded smartest model with industry-leading capabilities across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance

4. **Claude is a space to think** (Feb 4, 2026)
   - Commitment to ad-free service; advertising incentives incompatible with helpful AI

5. **Claude on Mars** (Jan 30, 2026)
   - "first AI-assisted drive on another planet" with NASA's Perseverance rover

## Newsroom Contact Information

- **Press inquiries**: press@anthropic.com
- **Non-media inquiries**: support@anthropic.com
- **Media assets**: Download press kit available

## Key Company Products & Services

**Claude Models**: Opus, Sonnet, Haiku

**Claude Platform Solutions**: AI agents, Code Security, code modernization, coding, customer support, education, financial services, government, healthcare, life sciences, nonprofits

**Claude Applications**: Claude for Chrome, Excel, PowerPoint, Slack; Claude Code; Claude Cowork

**Pricing Plans**: Max, Team, Enterprise

## Accessibility & Support

- Status page available
- 24/7 support center
- Available in multiple countries
- HIPAA-ready infrastructure for healthcare
